sub_479d.reason: Payment paused 19 days ago. Typical recovery window is 14 days — we're past it.
signals: App engagement dropped 72% in 30 days prior to pause
Support ticket filed 22 days ago · unresolved to customer's satisfaction
sub_479d.action: Offer 20% off next 3 months with an annual upgrade path. Customers matching this signal pattern accept this offer 41% of the time.

sub_469n.reason: Paused 3 weeks ago. Cinema engagement historically predictive — ticket bookings down 60%.
signals: Last event watched was low-engagement horror title
Similar customers paused within 90 days of resumption 48% of the time
sub_469n.action: Send curated picks for their genre preference (thriller + drama). Retention acceptance for this cohort: 38%.

sub_473j.reason: 31 successful collections — strongest loyalty signal. Churn risk is normal background only.
sub_473j.action: No action required. Consider upsell to Scale in Q3.

mandateRefresh.action: Manual outreach recommended — no fallback payment method
